analysis.reasoning: Core message: China announces its election to the UN Human Rights Council (2021–2023) and pledges to play an active, constructive role in protecting and promoting human rights. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention or criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; it presents China as constructive within a multilateral UN body, supporting protection and promotion of human rights, aligning with cooperative, rules-based, benevolent framing. CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically) – Not addressed; focus is international role, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Indirectly could imply prestige, but the tweet does not highlight domestic achievements or leadership success; it's an international role statement, so not applicable. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
